Default.name: Default
Default.description: Default profile - crypto, AI, geopolitics, and finance focus
Default.instructions:
I'm interested in cryptocurrency, AI, geopolitics, and finance.

Focus on:
- Main points, takeaways, and unique insights ("alpha")
- Specific data points, predictions, and actionable recommendations
- Technical analysis details when available
- Companies, projects, or entities mentioned (with brief context)

Please organize summaries to highlight information most relevant to my interests.

Omit:
- Marketing, sales pitches, demos, promo codes, advertizements, sponsors
